blockedLayers: All Skill doses pending medicine-by-medicine validation against the 2025 Pharmacopoeia
Pregnancy, compatibility, aristolochic-acid, formula, and acupoint action layers pending authoritative review
Five Movements and Six Qi health predictions

findings.description: The raw safety file contains 2 stale progress statements even though its table is populated. Raw package remains immutable; normalized status is authoritative for product eligibility.
The Skill explicitly says its dose data has not been calibrated to the current Pharmacopoeia. Integrity and textbook consistency cannot substitute for that validation.

Government publications disagree between 27 and 28 legal toxic-medicine labels; the normalized list keeps the complete 28-name version and records the omitted red lead preparation on the 27-name page.
